hooks.prompt: Check if the content being written contains hardcoded secrets, API keys, passwords, private keys, tokens, or connection strings. If found, BLOCK and warn the user.

Check if this conversation included file edits (Write or Edit tool calls) but no /nazar:scan was invoked. If so, add a single reminder line: 'Kod degisikligi yapildi ama guvenlik taramasi yapilmadi. /nazar:scan ile tarama yapmanizi oneririm.' Do NOT block, only remind.

If the user message contains 'deploy', 'push', 'release', 'publish', 'yayinla', 'store', check if a preflight scan was done in this session. If not, suggest: 'Deploy oncesi /nazar:preflight ile store kontrolu yapmanizi oneririm.'
